name: How do I know if GEO is working?
description: Track whether AI systems cite your pages, summarize your brand, or use your content in answers to target questions.

mainEntity.name: How do I know if GEO is working?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best proof is whether your target pages are being cited, summarized, or used as sources in AI answers for your core questions. You can also track changes in branded mentions, answer visibility, and engagement on pages that were optimized. If you serve markets like Los Angeles or Austin, compare the performance of location pages before and after the updates.
acceptedAnswer.description: Track whether AI systems cite your pages, summarize your brand, or use your content in answers to target questions.
